description_long: This sculpture consists of a tall, rectangular stone or concrete plinth with a classical architectural design, featuring a prominent cornice and a recessed panel. At the base of the plinth, there is a detailed statue of a seated human figure, possibly in a contemplative pose, rendered in a realistic style. The plinth has a light beige or off-white coloration, with subtle weathering and surface texture visible. The statue itself appears to be made of the same or similar material, blending harmoniously with the plinth. There are some visible holes and missing sections, suggesting either damage or incomplete scanning. The overall form is monumental and suggests a commemorative or memorial function, typical of public urban installations.
description: A tall, classical stone plinth with a seated human figure statue at its base, rendered in a realistic style and light beige color.
description_view_0: Front view showing the seated human figure statue clearly at the base of the tall plinth, with architectural details visible.
description_view_1: Side view with the plinth's recessed panel and cornice visible, but the statue is mostly obscured.
description_view_2: Rear angled view highlighting the plinth's height and structure, with no statue visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the statue at the base from the opposite side, with more of the plinth's side details visible.
attribute_subject_matter: seated human figure on a classical plinth
attribute_location_context: The sculpture appears to be installed in an outdoor urban or commemorative setting, likely in a plaza or near a public building.
